description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run Ad-hoc Command on Self-Hosted Runner that can be triggered manually with inputs for a command to run, an interactive debugging session flag, and a timeout. The workflow should run on a self-hosted linux-x64 runner with specific labels, restricted to certain actors. It cleans the workspace, checks out the repository, displays runner information, runs the specified command or sets up an interactive session with upterm, and notifies of command completion.
